infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GalleryApp needs access to your photo library to save downloaded images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GalleryApp needs access to add images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GalleryApp needs camera access to take a profile photo.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow GalleryApp to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow GalleryApp to save images to your gallery.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow GalleryApp to access your photos for profile avatar selection.
